channel.title: Leadership on Kaushik Bhat
channel.description: Recent content in Leadership on Kaushik Bhat

item.title: Talk - Scaling AI for CS
item.description: I did a small talk about RAY in a work event. Audience was senior tech folks who were exploring moving to my company. In all my previous talking events, I had to practice a lot and I would not be able to engage the audience quite well. This time, I was talking about something I was building day-in, day-out and I could paint a great picture of all things that worked and that didn’t. I could anticipate all the questions that the audience had in mind and would could intrigue them.
